title: General Recreational Activities/Sports * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > General Recreational Activities/Sports * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Blindness Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Native American Community Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Recreational activities offered include after-school drop-in sport clinics and seasonal sports teams, including basketball, volleyball and soccer. All activities emphasize healthy lifestyles, leadership, and environmentalism. Also holds drop-in clinics for activities like hip-hop dance and yoga. Open gym available for basketball and volleyball. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Native American students attending public schools Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 288-8177 216 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER RECREATION
